title: M24 Auto History Backfill Recommendation Loop

items.title: Scheduler consumes recommendation in auto mode
items.description: When QUANTA_HISTORY_BACKFILL_TARGET_START_BIZ_DATE=auto, the scheduler resolves the latest health recommendation into a concrete target_start_biz_date.

items.title: Auto mode falls back to target_open_days when needed
items.description: If no recommendation is available, auto mode falls back to QUANTA_HISTORY_BACKFILL_TARGET_OPEN_DAYS instead of stalling the scheduler.

items.title: Runtime exposes the resolved auto target
items.description: The runtime payload includes resolved_history_backfill_target_start_biz_date so operators can see what auto currently resolved to.

items.title: Corporate action provider caches raw dividend rows inside a backfill process
items.description: Long-window Tushare backfill should fetch raw dividend rows once per symbol in a provider instance, while continuing to apply biz-date-level as-of filtering for each snapshot.

items.title: Long-window history backfill can ingest raw facts incrementally and publish one terminal artifact
items.description: Backfill supports an artifact_mode=latest path; service history_backfill uses it, source-only intermediates are recorded in source_watermark_json, reruns no-op when the terminal artifact already covers the requested start, and app smoke still passes on qfq fixture data.
verification: env PYTHONPYCACHEPREFIX=/tmp/quanta-pycache python3 -m py_compile backend/app/domains/market_data/sync.py backend/app/domains/tasking/service_runner.py scripts/market_data_backfill_smoke.py scripts/tushare_live_backfill_smoke.py
